name: J1939ParseSHM
title: J1939ParseSHM
syntax: long J1939ParseSHM(pg* pgSHM, dword & sdmPgn, byte& sdmSourceAddress, byte& sdmDestinationAddress, byte& sequenceNumber, dword & crc):
description: Provides data of the SDM message, which are contained in payload of the SHM message according to SAE J1939-76.

parameters.name: pgSHM
parameters.description: SHM to parse. DLC of SHM shall be 8.

parameters.name: sdmPgn
parameters.description: Returns the PGN of the SDM.

parameters.name: sdmSourceAddress
parameters.description: Returns the source address of the SDM.

parameters.name: sdmDestinationAddress
parameters.description: Returns the destination address of the SDM.

parameters.name: sequenceNumber
parameters.description: Returns the sequence number of the Safety Data Group (SDG).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
